CustomField.description: Composite facility+service uniqueness key (design §2.3: "Composite uniqueness (facility+service) via VS_External_Id__c (Unique)"). Populated on CREATE by the before-save record-triggered flow VS_FacilityService_BeforeSave_SetExternalId (VS_Facility__c & "-" & VS_Service__c), which runs before this field's Unique constraint is evaluated, so a duplicate facility+service pairing is genuinely rejected at save (VS-01 AC-3). This is a plain Text field — NOT a formula field (formula fields cannot be marked externalId/unique, and default values cannot reference sibling fields on the same record; both were corrected after VS-01 review caught this as a deploy-blocking defect).
CustomField.label: External Id
